basic_details.job_title: KGBV Girls Hostels Jangaon Non-Teaching Staff Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Cook, ANM and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: KGBV Girls Hostels Jangaon Recruitment 2026: KGBV Girls Hostels Jangaon has released the official notification for 8 Non-Teaching Staff posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for specific age limit details and relaxation criteria for each post.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree with D.Ed / B.Ed, Intermediate and ANM training, 10th pass, 7th pass
qualification.details: Caretaker cum Warden: Degree with D.Ed / B.Ed ANM: Intermediate and ANM training Head Cook: 10th pass Assistant Cook: 7th pass Watch Woman: 10th pass

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for KGBV Girls Hostels Jangaon Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: raigad.gov.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 04-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download KGBV Girls Hostels Jangaon Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download KGBV Girls Hostels Jangaon Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the KGBV Girls Hostels Jangaon Non-Teaching Staff recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the KGBV Girls Hostels Jangaon Non-Teaching Staff recruitment is 04-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Non-Teaching Staff posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 8 vacancies available for Non-Teaching Staff posts in KGBV Girls Hostels Jangaon.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for the posts?
faq.answer: The educational qualifications range from 7th pass to Degree with D.Ed / B.Ed, depending on the specific post.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category in this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process primarily involves a Written Examination.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these positions is contractual.

faq.question: Q8. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by KGBV Girls Hostels Jangaon.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is 04/2026.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of KGBV Girls Hostels Jangaon.
